mapper.select:
SELECT itemcategory, COUNT(*) as CNT FROM LOST
AND lostloc = #{searchValue}
AND lostloc != '본관' AND lostloc != '중앙도서관' AND lostloc != '학생회관' AND lostloc != '공학관' AND lostloc != '인문관' AND lostloc != '경영관' AND lostloc != '체육관' AND lostloc != '기숙사'
GROUP BY itemcategory ORDER BY CNT DESC

SELECT lostloc, COUNT(*) as CNT FROM LOST
AND itemcategory = #{searchValue}
AND itemcategory != '전자기기' AND itemcategory != '지갑/현금' AND itemcategory != '카드/신분증' AND itemcategory != '도서/문구' AND itemcategory != '의류' AND itemcategory != '가방' AND itemcategory != '잡화/액세서리' AND itemcategory != '뷰티/화장품' AND itemcategory != '생활용품'
GROUP BY lostloc ORDER BY CNT DESC

SELECT
TO_CHAR(losttime, 'MM') as "LABEL",
TO_CHAR(losttime, 'DD') as "LABEL",
COUNT(*) as "CNT" FROM LOST
AND TO_CHAR(losttime, 'YYYY') = #{yearValue}
AND TO_CHAR(losttime, 'MM') = #{monthValue}
GROUP BY
TO_CHAR(losttime, 'MM')
TO_CHAR(losttime, 'DD')
ORDER BY "LABEL" ASC
